name: worma-benchmark
description: Benchmark comparing worma with other OpenAPI TypeScript code generators

scripts.dev: pnpm generate-specs && concurrently -n vite,hono -c blue,green "cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--expose-gc vite" "cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--expose-gc tsx server.ts"
scripts.dev:server: pnpm generate-specs && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--expose-gc tsx server.ts
scripts.start: pnpm generate-specs && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--expose-gc tsx server.ts --prod
scripts.clean: rm -rf output node_modules dist results specs
